title: Lead SEO Specialist at Jaypore International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Jaypore International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Jaypore International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jaypore International Enterprises:
Jaypore International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore International Enterprises!
